body_preview: - Trajectory graph pressure #1: deepseek_model_call_unmatched_completed_count=154 — lifecycle causes include model_completion_without_start=8 - Assessment: "154 ModelCallCompleted events without matching ModelCallStarted — the state recorder captures completions but sometimes misses starts" - These are evt-harness-* prefix events with tokens=in:0 out:0 cache

title: Filter harness-internal ModelCallCompleted events from unmatched count
